mechanics: DOCUMENTED: (1) CRATE / LOOTBOX system — 'You have opened a crate! Obtaining...' + a global 'Loot Notifier' feed: 'Loot Notifier - [player] just unboxed [item]'. Items unboxed include Warrior's Armor, Endless Torment (UT), various armors. (2) DAMAGE-CONTRIBUTION LOOT — drops/unboxes tagged 'with N% damage dealt!' (3%, 6%, 20%, 26%...) with on-screen X2/X3 multiplier markers (bag-tier or roll multipliers). (3) POTION STORAGE FULL — 'Potion Storage full! Potion of Wisdom/Defense...' (storage cap reached; complements the 'N left to max' + overflow->vault lines from prior tags). (4) Realm uses named NPC ANNOUNCERS for the event feed (Phoenix / Bat / Demon / Chimera / Spectre / Qbost prefix each boss spawn/defeat line). (5) Marble Colossus + Lycaon are realm/dungeon bosses with the confirmed taunts above.
